程序包的使用
org.apache.dubbo.common.timer

  • 使用org.apache.dubbo.common.timer的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    org.apache.dubbo.common.timer  
    org.apache.dubbo.registry.retry  
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support  
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support.header  
    org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.dispatcher.all2  
  • org.apache.dubbo.common.timer使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.timer中的类 
    类和说明
    Timeout
    A handle associated with a TimerTask that is returned by a Timer.
    Timer
    Schedules TimerTasks for one-time future execution in a background thread.
    TimerTask
    A task which is executed after the delay specified with Timer.newTimeout(TimerTask, long, TimeUnit) (TimerTask, long, TimeUnit)}.
  • org.apache.dubbo.registry.retry使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.timer中的类 
    类和说明
    Timeout
    A handle associated with a TimerTask that is returned by a Timer.
    TimerTask
    A task which is executed after the delay specified with Timer.newTimeout(TimerTask, long, TimeUnit) (TimerTask, long, TimeUnit)}.
  • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.timer中的类 
    类和说明
    Timer
    Schedules TimerTasks for one-time future execution in a background thread.
  • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support.header使用的org.apache.dubbo.common.timer中的类 
    类和说明
    Timeout
    A handle associated with a TimerTask that is returned by a Timer.
    TimerTask
    A task which is executed after the delay specified with Timer.newTimeout(TimerTask, long, TimeUnit) (TimerTask, long, TimeUnit)}.
